tools.name: utility_convert_timezone
tools.description:
Use this when you need to convert a date/time from one timezone to another. Returns the converted datetime with offset data in JSON.

Returns: 1. convertedDatetime (ISO 8601) 2. fromTimezone and toTimezone 3. utcOffset (e.g. "+01:00") 4. abbreviation (e.g. "CET", "EST") 5. isDST (boolean) 6. origina
